debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε
L : ℝ
hL : SeqLim ℓ L
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N1 N2 : ℕ
N : ℕ := N1 + N2
Nbnd1 : N1 ≤ N
Nbnd2 : N2 ≤ N
hN1 : |ℓ N - L| < ε / 3
Mmax M : ℕ
hM : M ≥ Mmax
hMmax : |(fun N_1 => RiemannSum (f N) a b N_1) M - ℓ N| < ε / 3
hN2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 3
⊢ |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|

proof:
have htri :
      |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤
        |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_sub_le (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f N) a b M) L)
  have htri2 :
      |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤
        |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_sub_le (RiemannSum (f N) a b M) (ℓ N) L)
  have hsymm : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| =
      |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := by
    simpa [abs_sub_comm]
  calc
    |RiemannSum F a b M - L|
        ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := by
          simpa [hsymm, add_comm] using htri
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          (|RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|) := by
          nlinarith [htri2]
    _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
          ring

    _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| +

have htri :

        = |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) +

    _ ≤ |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) +
